title: Is it Wise to Hold on to Federal Realty (FRT) Stock for Now?

title: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) Q3 FFO and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 3.25% and 4.17%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Shopping Center REITs: Supply/Demand Too Good To Ignore
text: For much of the last decade, pundits have been calling for the death of brick and mortar retail. The last few years proved out the benefit of retailers offering customers multiple channels and highlighted the indispensability of brick and mortar retail.
